message:
chore: extend perf.data glob to catch perf.data.old and variants

The existing perf.data pattern missed suffixed variants like
perf.data.old that perf(1) creates when overwriting previous runs.
Adds perf.data.* glob for full coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ crates/**/tests/artifacts/
 
 # Profiling artifacts
 perf.data
+perf.data.*
 flamegraph.svg
 
 # Benchmark results (generated per-run by scripts/bench_cli.sh)
